content: Nice guide thanks! The only problem I have with Saya is that her Divine realm is just so weird <:Brown_think:1459080117308620996>

Great insights, peak commentary, thank you for your work~ <:Catsiah:1441868724226228265>  
Although, I am fairly certain that the exalt bonus from the Propagation Embryo still applies, even if you devour it instead of consuming it directly, which makes the lives of Doresain, Sorel and Uvhash considerably easier  
Tested it with Salvador on Saya's release
